[PDF_PAGE 99 | score=7] SKILLS CAREERS" This iS catchall category for an infinite number of special skills related t0 professions_ Since there is a endless supply of unique professions in the Battle Tech universe this generic category applies to them all rather than listing them separately: From Judge t0 Librarian, the possibilities are endless_ Of course_ certain professions require additiona skills. For example doctor needs more than Career /Doctor in order t0 practice medicine would also need First Aid MedTech Surgery and other skills In many cases_ the occupational fields 52) offer guidance on these requirements The final arbiter these cases is always the gamemaster; As rule 0t thumb there is an appropriate skill to profession on the Skill List, character must have it to be considered professional. Additionally; the Computers Skill allows player t0 hack into computer systems by making Computers Skill Check: If system operator (sysop} is online when character attempts t0 hack into system; an Opposed Test is instead made using the character' = and sysop'$ Computers Skills If the sysop wins the would-be hacker is forced offline ad any further attempts on the same system receive +2 modifier: the hacking character wins he breaks into the system; but the sysop may be aware of the intrusion. If the hacker' = Margin of Success exceeds the sysop' MoS by three or more, the intrusion goes unnoticed Otherwise_ the sysop is aware of the breach and may shut down the system in 106 turns Once inside system; hacking character can act freely; though complex tasks may require Action Checks (bad failures and fumbles may alert sysop at the gamemaster'= discretion). system IS being shut down; hacking character can make one Computer Check per round in a attempt to extract data; these attempts suffer pressure mod
